title: The Mom Who Disappeared Into Thin Air

scenes.text: In 1985, 23-year-old young mother, Sheila, vanished without a word.
Witnesses report last seeing her at a local store.
Sheila's case has baffled local authorities for decades.
Despite various leads, Sheila's fate remains a mystery.
Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: The chilling case of Sheila's disappearance in 1985 continues to haunt Cincinnati. Investigators still hope to uncover the truth behind her sudden vanishing. Keep following for more true crime mysteries.
